channel.title: Responsible AI on Cyril's Cloud & AI Daily
channel.description: Recent content in Responsible AI on Cyril's Cloud & AI Daily

item.title: Microsoft named a Leader in the IDC MarketScape: Worldwide API Management 2026 Vendor Assessment
item.description:
There’s been an important development in the Azure OpenAI & GPT Models space that caught my attention, and I wanted to break it down — not just what was announced, but why it matters and how it fits into the bigger picture.

What’s New

As AI moves into production, how systems interact is fundamentally changing. Organizations must now manage not just APIs, but how AI systems operate across the enterprise.
